title: pyrus × aucuparioides
intro: Pyrus × aucuparioides is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Pyrus communis (common pear) and Pyrus aucuparia (sorrel pear). It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to relieve fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Pyrus × aucuparioides include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
